subject: how much they're spending

body:
As Joe's finance director, most of my job is pouring over our fundraising numbers to make sure we have the resources to run a winning campaign. |
---

| | Peter,

As Joe's finance director, most of my job is pouring over our fundraising numbers to make sure we have the resources to run a winning campaign. But from time to time, I also take a look at the dark money spending to see exactly how much they're spending against us -- and let me tell you, it's frightening.

The Kochs and their allies have already spent roughly $3.5 million on this race, far exceeding their spending at this time in 2012 -- and the election year hasn't even started yet. They're on track to make this Indiana's **first $100 million race**. But we can fight back. While our opponents will be running a race that relies on receiving a few huge checks, or even writing those big checks themselves, our campaign will be run on contributions from grassroots donors like you.

**Will you chip in towards our $20,000 mid-month goal and help Joe compete with the dark money coming into our state?** | [](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c25ce/7377f838/3225a805/51fa4503/3200935664/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-dec17mm?refcode=20171213nd&amount=10")

Tomorrow, the Federal Communications Commission will vote to roll back net neutrality - the regulations keeping the internet free and open.

[**Listen up, we must protect net neutrality to keep the internet open and free. Show your support for net neutrality today. name: The White House
subject: The closing argument for tax reform
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7218db3276778dec380cb5e37bca56e1501e69a95835ebe04bd65371505dadecb3f6e35e98586add9ede8571214ffa7990b88b6d450f92f5

The closing argument for tax reform

President Donald J. Trump spoke before a crowd in the White House Grand Foyer yesterday to lay out—in concrete terms—what tax cuts would mean for the typical American household.
“As we speak, Congress has reached an agreement on tax legislation that will deliver more jobs, higher wages, and massive tax relief for American families and for American companies,” the President said.

Here’s the President’s case by the numbers:

- $2,000+: What the typical family of four earning $75,000 will see in income tax cuts, slashing their tax bill in half
- $4,000: How much incomes are expected to rise across the board as a result of tax cuts on U.S. businesses
- 1/3: The amount one sample Ohio family in the 25-percent bracket and paying nearly $14,000 in taxes would reduce their yearly tax burden
- 3%: The level of growth the U.S. economy has already surged to—tax reform would take it even further

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7218db3276778dec794593ffbd587c0cb0bd53b3789192203ae1244f869fbba0dc22749eec134a596025780a852ea5d6e59e79b21a1c9337
Watch President Trump and five working families make the case for tax reform.

Bonus: “Tax bill is
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7218db3276778decc5fe9e17f1526e3a212e6a1b42209eb56c2368514d1cecc99a417726d89dd2fb0db59627ef23a21e58130467f9419833
Christmas present Americans have been waiting for,” says Alfredo Ortiz

‘Transparency and engagement is the right way to go’

Recent history reminds Americans that cybersecurity will be at the top of everyone’s mind in the years ahead. In just one example, the 2015 U.S. Office of Personnel Management data breach saw the records of as many as 4 million people compromised.

In May, President Trump signed an executive order to strengthen the cybersecurity of the federal government’s networks and critical infrastructure. Yesterday, Chris Liddell of the White House’s American Technology Council and Jack Wilmer of the Office of Science and Technology Policy announced that a final report was ready.

“We certainly feel like transparency and engagement is the right way to go,” Liddell said. “The 50 actions articulated in the report will complement existing agency efforts to modernize citizen-facing services.”

Read Liddell and Wilmer’s
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7218db3276778decfbb82f3fe583fc5e6408064f97e3be68cfc7c2f21bc87dd2937dfb83f7113f9336c46c97e9cedf7b2fc9f4c737cacc9e
blog post, and see the full
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7218db3276778dece0c7f938ba01d068033e2a814966bd033eec80ccc62edce0fe0dc168c73cd2d984a848ec134469410feb7cffec45b370
web-friendly report here.

Coming today: The President’s 2018 regulatory agenda

Economic growth has climbed back above 3 percent, and the Administration’s deregulation push is a big part of the reason why.

President Trump will speak this afternoon about the progress made on the deregulation front in 2017 and highlight the publication of his “2018 Unified Regulatory Agenda.”

Here’s what the President will tell Americans:

- Agencies have substantially exceeded the White House’s “1 in, 2 out” directive that halts growth of the administrative state
- Net regulatory costs were flat to negative in 2017
- There will be a significant negative regulatory cost in 2018—with all agencies contributing to the effort

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7218db3276778deca09387652cc36239d06f9a522567637b065a9283c7e349482214b1cf524588bae1f1ea53e9fe9ceadce4759a960dd85a
Watch the President speak live at 2:30 p.m. EST.

Photo of the Day

Trump spoke before a crowd in the White House Grand Foyer yesterday to lay out—in concrete terms—what tax cuts would mean for the typical American household. “As we speak, Congress has reached an agreement on tax legislation that will deliver more jobs, higher wages, and massive tax relief for American families and for American companies,” the President said. Here’s the President’s case by the numbers: - $2,000+: What the typical family of four earning $75,000 will see in income tax cuts, slashing their tax bill in half - $4,000: How much incomes are expected to rise across the board as a result of tax cuts on U.S. businesses - 1/3: The amount one sample Ohio family in the 25-percent bracket and paying nearly $14,000 in taxes would reduce their yearly tax burden - 3%: The level of growth the U.S. economy has already surged to—tax reform would take it even further Watch President Trump and five working families make the case for tax reform. Bonus: “Tax bill is Christmas present Americans have been waiting for,” says Alfredo Ortiz ‘Transparency and engagement is the right way to go’ Recent history reminds Americans that cybersecurity will be at the top of everyone’s mind in the years ahead. In just one example, the 2015 U.S. Office of Personnel Management data breach saw the records of as many as 4 million people compromised. In May, President Trump signed an executive order to strengthen the cybersecurity of the federal government’s networks and critical infrastructure. Yesterday, Chris Liddell of the White House’s American Technology Council and Jack Wilmer of the Office of Science and Technology Policy announced that a final report was ready. “We certainly feel like transparency and engagement is the right way to go,” Liddell said. “The 50 actions articulated in the report will complement existing agency efforts to modernize citizen-facing services.” Read Liddell and Wilmer’s blog post, and see the full web-friendly report here. name: Tim Kaine
subject: The end of fairness
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek,

Moments ago, the five members of the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) voted to repeal net neutrality. Let's talk about what that means:

Many of our modern systems and institutions -- including commerce, education, and more -- rely on a free and open Internet. And that freedom and openness is what net neutrality has ensured. Net neutrality means that Internet service providers can't speed up certain content that makes them more money or aligns with their politics -- and they also can't slow down content that is less lucrative or that they just plain don't like.

It's the basis for fairness on the Internet. **But now, that era of fairness is over. This is extremely troubling.[Will you add your name to tell the FCC you disagree with this decision?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=hwAY592mJLafb%2FSFLDDYyJ3PFpZX%2FvDI)**

One thing I've been digging into: What does the end of net neutrality actually mean for people like you and me? For one thing, it allows service providers to charge more for certain services -- for example, they could put all the offerings of the Internet, like video streaming sites and social media, up on a cutting board, and slice them into separate packages -- and then charge consumers more if they want to buy both.

The end of net neutrality could also allow those big companies to censor what we see and do online by slowing down certain content.

And disturbingly, it could mean that marginalized communities -- that already have limited Internet access -- could have even _less_ access.

I don't want corporations controlling what I can access online -- and I'm betting you don't either. So will you take a stand with me? **[Add your name in favor of a free and open Internet.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=YRL65uDS0lF%2BJmp0P3N9RJ3PFpZX%2FvDI)**

Tim

Team --

If Republicans really wanted to give a tax cut to the middle class, they wouldn't have voted for a bill that raises taxes for the middle class.

Because if you really want to give the middle class a tax cut, then you need to give the middle class a tax cut -- not big corporations and the wealthy.

Look, friend, the votes might be in, but I'm not done fighting like hell -- and my Senate Democratic colleagues aren't done either. We're committed to keeping Republicans accountable for their actions. But we can't do this alone.

[**So I 'm asking, friend, will you stand with me and Senate Democrats in this fight? Simply chip in $1 now to show you're ready to fight tooth-and-nail to keep the other side accountable.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20171214-Brown-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Republicans might choose to give huge tax giveaways to the rich and big corporations. Or choose to increase the national deficit by $1 trillion. Or even choose to leave 13 million Americans without health insurance.

But I choose to do otherwise.

I choose to keep giving the other side hell. I choose to keep fighting to protect the interests of hardworking, middle-class Americans, not the rich and powerful. And, I choose to keep standing up to Republicans and hold them accountable for their actions.

**Show you 're standing with me and my Democratic Senate colleagues in this fight. Chip in $1 to say you're ready to keep Republicans accountable for their toxic actions:**

[**http://www.dscc.org/keep-republicans-accountable**](http://action.dscc. name: Tom Perez
subject: TOMORROW: Dec. 15th deadline to enroll in Obamacare
body:
Enroll today.
---
Hi, Derek --

The open enrollment period for Obamacare ends tomorrow -- we need your help getting out the word so people can get enrolled for affordable health insurance before it's too late, because the Trump administration isn't lifting a finger to help.

Will you forward this email to 10 of your friends, or share this information on **[Twitter](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ea5/4067b0a/4f142227c/7e5d2b86/28067382/VEsH/ "https://twitter.com/TheDemocrats/status/926229422868434944?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=em_20171214_tp_nd&source=em_20171214_tp_nd")** and **[Facebook](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ea5/4067b0a/4f142227c/7e5d2b87/28067382/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/GetAmericaCovered/videos/137311366923741?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=em_20171214_tp_nd&source=em_20171214_tp_nd")**?

Thanks,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

\----- Forwarded message -----
From: Keith Ellison
Date: Sat, Nov 4, 2017
Subject: [ACA UPDATE] Open enrollment is underway

**Open enrollment to get coverage under the Affordable Care Act for 2018 ends December 15th -- but Trump doesn't want anyone to know about it.

If you need to, apply to get covered today. Then share this message with your loved ones and friends so they can, too.

** **[ENROLL TODAY](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ea5/4067b0a/4f142227c/7e5d2b84/28067382/VEsF/ "https://www.getamericacovered.org?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+ENROLL+TODAY&utm_campaign=em_20171214_tp_nd&source=em_20171214_tp_nd")**
I wanted to send a quick note to make sure you know that open enrollment for Obamacare started on November 1st and continues through December 15th.

Spread the word, Derek! Forward this email, and share the news on **[Twitter](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ea5/4067b0a/4f142227c/7e5d2b85/28067382/VEsC/ "https://twitter.com/TheDemocrats/status/926229422868434944?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=em_20171214_tp_nd&source=em_20171214_tp_nd")** and **[Facebook](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ea5/4067b0a/4f142227c/7e5d2b82/28067382/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/GetAmericaCovered/videos/137311366923741?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=em_20171214_tp_nd&source=em_20171214_tp_nd")** so your friends can get covered. And if you need to get enrolled yourself, you can do that right **[here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ea5/4067b0a/4f142227c/7e5d2b83/28067382/VEsA/ "https://www.getamericacovered.org?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171214_tp_nd&source=em_20171214_tp_nd")**.

You and I both know how important it is to make getting covered as easy and affordable as possible. But Donald Trump and his administration have gone out of their way to make it harder for Americans to enroll.

So far, the Trump administration has:

* Cut the time window for open enrollment in half
* Slashed funding for informational advertising and outreach programs on Obamacare
* Used taxpayer funds to run federally-funded anti-Obamacare campaigns (really!)
* And abandoned state programs that helped people enroll

That means it's on all of us to make sure our family and friends have the information they need to get health insurance.

In spite of all of Trump's sabotage efforts, Obamacare is working. And 62 percent of Americans want to see Obamacare maintained.

**We have to do everything we can to help folks get enrolled -- and I'm calling on your help to do so. If you need to enroll, get started today. And if you're already covered, help get the word out there on Twitter and Facebook so our loved ones and neighbors can get covered too:**

**[ENROLL NOW](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ea5/4067b0a/4f142227c/7e5d2b80/28067382/VEsB/ "https://www.getamericacovered.org?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+ENROLL+NOW&utm_campaign=em_20171214_tp_nd&source=em_20171214_tp_nd")**
**[SHARE ON FACEBOOK](http://my.democrats. "https://www.facebook.com/GetAmericaCovered/videos/137311366923741?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+SHARE+ON+FACEBOOK&utm_campaign=em_20171214_tp_nd&source=em_20171214_tp_nd")**
**[SHARE ON TWITTER](http://my.democrats. "https://twitter.com/TheDemocrats/status/926229422868434944?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+SHARE+ON+TWITTER&utm_campaign=em_20171214_tp_nd&source=em_20171214_tp_nd")**
Thanks,

Keith

Keith Ellison
Deputy Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ea5/4067b0a/4f142227c/7e5d2b8f/28067382/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20171214_tp_nd&source=em_20171214_tp_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ea5/4067b0a/4f142227c/7e5d2b8c/28067382/VEsHBA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171214_tp_nd&source=em_20171214_tp_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ea5/4067b0a/4f142227c/7e5d2b8d/28067382/VEsHBw/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171214_tp_nd&source=em_20171214_tp_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ea5/4067b0a/4f142227c/7e5d2b8a/28067382/VEsHBg/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171214_tp_nd&source=em_20171214_tp_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: Because of you…
body:
| | We took the nation by surprise - we must do it again
---
[ ](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171214_ea_s1&n=1)
| Dear Peter, Because of you, a record number of Christians turned out to vote for Biblical values in 2016. The Christians who used our My Faith Votes voting technology had a high voter turnout rate of 82% far surpassing the national average voter turnout rate of only 55%. And again in 2017, you helped us draw Christian’s attention to over 2,000 local elections that took place around the country. Because of your support in 2017, we were able to send over a **quarter of a million election reminder emails** to Christians about their local elections and reach hundreds of thousands more through social media. Your investment in our work made this possible. Thank you. Twenty-seventeen is now almost over, and the political election map of 2018 is taking shape. The fight for the Senate and House will be fierce. It will be critical we elect leaders in 2018 who are willing to boldly stand for Biblical principles. To engage more Christians to vote in 2018, we must reach our $500,000 year-end goal. Peter, your support right now will make a big difference as we prepare for the crucial 2018 midterm elections. So I challenge you to help equip more Christians to vote their faith so that America Stands Strong for God, and our nation’s future is protected. [Please give your best gift now – and take advantage of the $50,000 Matching Grant opportunity that will double yourcontribution!](http://www3.myfaithvotes.org/2017121401?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171214_ea_s1&n=2) But you must act now – any part of the grant that’s not met in full will be lost. Thank you for your support and prayers to be ready for 2018! It’s an honor to stand with you. **United. We Stand.**

Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171214_ea_s1&n=3) [](http://www3.myfaithvotes.org/2017121401?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171214_ea_s1&n=4)
* * *
_My Faith Votes is a non-partisan movement focused on motivating Christians in America to participate in local and national elections and be active members of society. By partnering with local churches, pastors, and national faith leaders, My Faith Votes mobilizes and equips Christians to lead the conversation on the place of faith in culture and politics._
---

name: Joe Donnelly
subject: because of my vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
I voted against Mitch McConnell's tax bill because it failed my test: It didn't bring more good-paying jobs to Indiana. |
---

| | Peter,

I voted against Mitch McConnell's tax bill because it failed my test: It didn't bring more good-paying jobs to Indiana. **And it certainly won 't put more money in the pockets of the Hoosiers who leave for work in the dark and come home in the dark to provide for their families.**

I'm eager to work with anyone who wants to rewrite the tax code to make it better for hardworking middle-class families. But the bill presented to us did the opposite. It raises taxes on the middle class, explodes the deficit, and strips 13 million Americans of their health care.

Now because of my vote, the same Washington special interests who are spending millions in an effort to pass their tax plan are going to come after me -- and they won't wait until next November. The spending could start TODAY.

I have Indiana's back in the Senate, now I hope you'll stand with me, too. **Can you contribute $5 to keep me in the Senate fighting for Hoosier families?**

Thank you,

Joe

---
[](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d051/2b07114c/aae6d64f/7319322b/997499145/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/fight-the-gop-tax-scam?source=PT-20171214-Signature_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")
Mitch McConnell is refusing to listen to the people of Alabama.

On Tuesday, the people of Alabama stood on the right side of history and chose Doug Jones as their new Senator.

But now, Republicans are refusing to let Senator-Elect Jones represent the voices of Alabama by trying to ram through their tax scam before Doug can make it to Washington.

[**Add your name to stand with Senate Democrats who are fighting to make sure Doug Jones can represent the people of Alabama by voting on the GOP tax bill.**](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d051/2b07114c/aae6d64f/7319322b/997499145/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/fight-the-gop-tax-scam?source=PT-20171214-Signature_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

Democrats are just asking for the same process Republicans demanded back in 2010. When Massachusetts elected Scott Brown during a special election, Mitch McConnell INSISTED on delaying key votes until Brown could be seated.

But now that Doug Jones' election jeopardizes the GOP's tax breaks for the wealthy, McConnell suddenly wants a different rulebook.

It's time for Republicans to live up to the same standards they held Democrats to for years.

**Senate Democrats are fighting to make sure Doug Jones gets a voice and a vote on the tax bill. Add your name now to stand with them >>**

[**http://www.dscc.org/fight-against-the-tax-scam**](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d051/2b07114c/aae6d64f/7319322b/997499145/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/fight-the-gop-tax-scam?source=PT-20171214-Signature_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

Thanks,

Team DSCC

name: R. Jai Gillum
subject: 26 lives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3233/9e00690/41f2660f/2403dc3e/2112390777/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em17_171214_GunRef_fnd_gq_ful__AG&source=em17_171214_GunRef_fnd_gq_ful__AG")
Hello,

Five years ago today at Sandy Hook Elementary School, we lost 26 lives to a tragedy so unthinkably evil that it is still tough to describe it.

As a mother, my heart breaks for the parents who lost a child that day. Twenty of our babies -- gone. And, as an American, I'm appalled that despite the numerous massacres since, the weapons that were responsible are still readily available to people today without even a background check.

**A club in Orlando; a concert in Las Vegas; a church in Charleston; and a school in Newtown. Places of learning, of fun, and of worship should not be places of terror and fear.**

As hopeless as we can sometimes feel in the wake of perpetual tragedies, we must continue to band together and fight for common-sense gun safety measures right here in Florida and throughout America.

**[We're all working our hardest to elect Andrew, but I hope that you will join me in urging Congress to finally pass a common-sense gun safety law before more children and innocent people die.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3233/9e00690/41f2660f/2403dc31/2112390777/VEsE/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/call-on-congress-to-pass-common-sense-gun-reform?utm_campaign=em17_171214_GunRef_fnd_gq_ful__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&source=em17_171214_GunRef_fnd_gq_ful__AG&utm_content=2+-++Were+all+working+our+hardest+to+elect+A")**

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3233/9e00690/41f2660f/2403dc30/2112390777/VEsF/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/call-on-congress-to-pass-common-sense-gun-reform?utm_campaign=em17_171214_GunRef_fnd_gq_ful__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&source=em17_171214_GunRef_fnd_gq_ful__AG&utm_content=3")
Whether it's access to weapons that are effectively fully automatic, or holding the perpetrators of domestic violence accountable, or helping those with mental illnesses, these are all important steps that can save lives.

I'm proud that my husband fought for over a year to beat the NRA here at home by refusing to repeal an ordinance that prevents people from shooting guns where our kids play and families picnic. Every parent in Florida should know that their child is safe -- and I'm proud to know that Andrew will fight to make that happen, even if politicians in D.C. won't.

We need to do better for ourselves and for future generations -- and we must take swift action to end the gun violence plaguing America. There are millions of voices like us who know that now is the time for action -- and if we keep making ourselves heard, we can save lives.

**[Will you join Andrew and me and take action now? Add your name today.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3233/9e00690/41f2660f/2403dc33/2112390777/VEsC/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/call-on-congress-to-pass-common-sense-gun-reform?utm_campaign=em17_171214_GunRef_fnd_gq_ful__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&source=em17_171214_GunRef_fnd_gq_ful__AG&utm_content=4+-+Will+you+join+Andrew+and+me+and+take+act")**

Thank you,

R. Jai Gillum

[Add your name](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3233/9e00690/41f2660f/2403dc32/2112390777/VEsD/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/call-on-congress-to-pass-common-sense-gun-reform?utm_campaign=em17_171214_GunRef_fnd_gq_ful__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&source=em17_171214_GunRef_fnd_gq_ful__AG&utm_content=5+-+Add+your+name")

Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3233/9e00690/41f2660f/2403dc35/2112390777/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=6+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em17_171214_GunRef_fnd_gq_ful__AG"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3233/9e00690/41f2660f/2403dc34/2112390777/VEsB/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=7+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em17_171214_GunRef_fnd_gq_ful__AG&source=em17_171214_GunRef_fnd_gq_ful__AG"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3233/9e00690/41f2660f/2403dc37/2112390777/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=8+-+You+can+support+our+campaign+by+making+a&utm_campaign=em17_171214_GunRef_fnd_gq_ful__AG&source=em17_171214_GunRef_fnd_gq_ful__AG")
